meta.homeDescription: Discover represented talent, save shortlists, and work with the agency — managed discovery and representation.
meta.directoryDescription: Browse represented talent — save profiles to your shortlist and contact the agency.
meta.modelsDescription: Explore represented models and talent — agency-managed discovery and representation.
meta.contactDescription: Get in touch with the agency — inquiries and representation.

header.savedDirectoryAria: Go to directory and saved talent
header.directoryShortlistTooltipEmpty: Save talent from the grid, then open your shortlist here
header.directoryInquiryTooltipEmpty: Open the inquiry form — add talent with search or save from the directory
header.directoryInquiryTooltipWithShortlist: Contact now — your shortlist is ready to send

profile.portfolioEmptyDescription: This profile may still be updating — check back later or contact the agency.
profile.aiPanelBody: Similar profiles and smart summaries will appear here when AI features are enabled.
profile.sidebarAgencyBody: Bookings and inquiries are handled exclusively through the agency — not via this profile.
profile.footerCtaBody: Add this talent to your inquiry list, browse more represented talent, or reach out to the agency directly.

hero.subtitle: Search the directory by role, location, or fit using natural language. Agency-managed, no direct contact.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Describe your event or talent needs…
typedExamples: Bilingual hosts for a resort launch
Editorial models for a luxury brand shoot
VIP host for a corporate gala — English and Spanish
Promotional models for a boutique venue opening
Brand ambassadors for a hospitality activation

location.mapLoadErrorBody: Google returned ApiNotActivatedMapError: enable Maps JavaScript API on the Cloud project for this key (Places and Maps are separate toggles). Billing must be on; if the key has restrictions, add HTTP referrers for this site—then hard-refresh.

howItWorks.sectionTitle: Three steps to the right talent
howItWorks.step1Body: Search naturally or browse by type, location, and use case. Every profile is agency-curated.
howItWorks.step2Body: Add talent to your list. No account required to start — sign up when you're ready.
howItWorks.step3Body: Submit your event details and selected talent. The agency handles coordination and booking.

cta.title: Ready to find the right talent?
cta.body: Tell us about your event, and the agency will match you with the perfect talent for any occasion.

directory.configMissingBody: Connect Supabase (see .env.example) to load published talent.
directory.pausedBody: Public discovery is currently paused. Please contact the agency directly for availability.
directory.pageDescription: Explore talent, save profiles you like, and send a booking request in minutes.
directory.aiPanelBody: Semantic search and refinements will appear here when AI features are enabled.
directory.discoverLoadError: The directory could not be loaded right now. Please refresh or try again shortly.
directory.loadResultsError: Could not load directory results right now. Check your connection and try again.
directory.emptyResults: No talent matches these filters yet. Try clearing filters or check back soon.

inquiry.flashAddedShortlist: Added to your shortlist — open the inquiry panel when you’re ready.

mobile.sheetDescription: Filter talent by type, skills, industry, and more.

hero.interpretError: Could not understand your search. Showing plain text results instead.
hero.interpretErrorDirectoryClosed: The talent directory is not open to the public, so natural-language search cannot run. In Admin → Site settings, turn on “Directory public”, then try again.
hero.interpretErrorAiDisabled: AI search is turned off. In Admin → AI → AI Settings, enable “AI search (vector / hybrid)”.
hero.interpretErrorService: The search service is not reachable right now. Check your connection or try again shortly.

filters.locationPlaceholder: Click to list cities, then type to filter…
filters.noCitiesYet: No cities are available for filtering yet.
filters.emptyAsideBody: No filter groups are available yet. The directory only shows sections that have options (taxonomy terms or cities).
filters.emptyAsideBulletAdmin: Admin → Directory filters: enable and order facets (taxonomy, city, height).
filters.emptyAsideBulletMigration: Apply Supabase migration 20260411220000_directory_facet_count_rpcs.sql for per-option counts.
filters.filterNoLabelsMatch: No filter labels match — try another word.
filters.filterNothingMatches: Nothing matches "{q}". Clear the search to see every group again.

card.linkCopiedMessage: Profile link is on your clipboard.
card.linkCopyFailedMessage: Select the profile and copy the URL from the address bar.

preview.editorialOnly: Editorial preview only. Open the full profile for the complete gallery and booking context.

inquiry.sessionUnavailable: Session unavailable — refresh and try again.
inquiry.unableToSaveTrySignIn: Unable to save — try again or sign in.
inquiry.messageInGoodHands: Your message is in good hands.
inquiry.preparedClientAccount: We also prepared your client account.
inquiry.activateAccountAnyTime: You can activate an account any time.
inquiry.quickAddPlaceholder: Search by name or profile code…
inquiry.sheetDescWithShortlist: You have talent on your shortlist — add details and we’ll come back to you.
inquiry.sheetDescEmptyShortlist: Tell us what you need, add talent from search below, and send a single brief to the agency.
inquiry.shortlistEmptyDescription: Add at least one published profile to send an inquiry to the agency.
inquiry.shortlistEmptyHintAfter: on any card in the directory — then complete the form below.
inquiry.messageDetailsPaused: Inquiries are currently paused. Your shortlist stays saved.
inquiry.messageDetailsClient: Signed in — your account is attached to this inquiry.
inquiry.messageDetailsGuest: Guest inquiry — you can create an account later to track requests.
inquiry.inquiriesPausedNotice: New inquiry submissions are temporarily closed. You can keep saving talent and return when the agency reopens requests.
inquiry.guestCtaAfterLoginLink: to attach this to your client profile.
inquiry.aiAssistBody: When AI drafting is on, open the assistant under “Brief for the agency” to generate or polish your message.
inquiry.successInquirySentDescription: Your request reached the agency and the selected talent stayed attached to this inquiry.
inquiry.successFollowUpWithEmail: We’ll follow up by email at {email}.
inquiry.activationEmailMatched: This email already matches a client account.
inquiry.activationBenefits: Activate or sign in to track requests, view bookings, save favorites, reuse your details next time, and manage multiple work locations faster.
inquiry.quickAddMinCharsHint: Type at least two characters to search published talent.
inquiry.formWhatsAppTitleOn: Open a pre-filled message to the agency on WhatsApp.
inquiry.formWhatsAppTitleOff: WhatsApp is not configured by the agency yet.
inquiry.formPlaceholderLookingFor: Example: bilingual promo models for a luxury hotel launch in Cancun
inquiry.formPlaceholderBrief: Dates, location, dress code, languages needed…
inquiry.formDraftError: Could not generate a draft. Try again or write your own brief.
inquiry.formDraftPolishNeedText: Add some text in the brief first to polish it.
inquiry.formDraftHint: AI suggests text you can edit before sending. The agency reviews every inquiry.
inquiry.formPrivacyNotice: By sending this, you contact the agency only. Talent is not notified directly and does not receive your details.

errors.inquiry: Could not submit inquiry. Try again.

models.title: Models
models.body: Directory and filters will connect here as the platform is built.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Inquiry flows and agency contact will live here.

dashboard.impersonationV1ReadOnlyQa: v1 read-only QA mode — saves and mutations are disabled.

clientOverview.title: Overview
clientOverview.subtitle: Jump into each area of your portal — the workspace bar above keeps directory and cart one tap away.
clientOverview.helpItem1: Saved talent is your shortlist from the directory.
clientOverview.helpItem2: Requests show inquiry status after you submit from the cart.
clientOverview.noRequestsYet: No requests yet — add talent to your cart and submit a brief when you’re ready.
clientOverview.bookingsDesc: Confirmed work shared by the agency.
clientOverview.bookingsFootnote: Jobs linked to your account after an inquiry moves forward.
clientOverview.addCompanyHint: Add your company in Account settings.

talentStatus.pageDescription: Where you are with the agency, what happens next, and a clear record of submissions and decisions.
